title: aira cespitosa var. minor
intro: Aira cespitosa var. minor, also known as lesser hair grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa var. minor include reducing fever, relieving muscle cramps, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Aira cespitosa var. minor can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
